features.label: Network Speed Indicator
features.desc: Live bar showing page load time, DNS+TCP+TTFB latency, transfer size and download speed. Color-coded: green <500ms, yellow <2s, red >2s.
features.howto: Appears automatically on every page load

features.label: YouTube Ad Blocker
features.desc: Two-layer blocking: main process cancels ad network requests, CSS hides all ad DOM elements.

features.label: Ad Speed Control + Auto-Skip
features.desc: Unskippable ads muted and sped up (4x–256x). Skip button auto-clicked. Video restored after ad.

features.label: Version Display Fix
features.desc: About section showed 'Version —' in packaged builds. Fixed by using app.getVersion() as primary source.

features.label: Settings Toggle Not Rendering
features.desc: YouTube section toggle class mismatch fixed — toggle now renders correctly.
